en_title: X-Men '97 Season 2 Disney+ Release Date Confirmed, Debut Trailer Released

paragraphs.en: X-Men '97 Season 2 finally has a release date — July 1 on Disney+ — and a debut trailer confirming the appearance of a long list of new characters, and a big reversal in fortunes for Wolverine.
paragraphs.cn: 《X战警97》第二季终于敲定上线日期——7月1日登陆Disney+，同时首支预告片正式发布，确认了大量新角色登场，并预示金刚狼的命运将迎来巨大反转。

paragraphs.en: Warning! Spoilers for X-Men '97 Season 1 follow:
paragraphs.cn: ⚠️注意！以下内容含《X战警97》第一季剧透：

paragraphs.en: Towards the end of X-Men '97 Season 1, Magneto rips the adamantium right out of Wolverine's body in a scene directly adapted from the 1993 Fatal Attractions comic storyline. But in the Season 2 trailer, below, we see Wolverine alive and well — complete with his adamantium claws. So clearly something positive has happened to Logan following his torrid time at the end of the last season.
paragraphs.cn: 在《X战警97》第一季的末尾，万磁王从金刚狼体内直接撕扯出他骨骼上的艾德曼合金，这一场景直接改编自1993年漫画篇章《致命吸引力》。但在下面这支第二季预告片里，我们看到金刚狼活蹦乱跳——艾德曼合金爪也完好如初。显然，罗根在上一季末经历那段惨烈时刻之后，迎来了某种转机。

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere, the trailer shows Apocalypse as the antagonist of Season 2. The X-Men are scattered through time and must face the incredibly powerful villain in various eras, from the ancient past to the far future.
paragraphs.cn: 另外，预告片显示天启将成为第二季的反派。X战警成员被分散到不同时代，必须在从远古到遥远未来的各个时空中迎战这位力量恐怖的强敌。

paragraphs.en: We see En Sabah Nur in Ancient Egypt (the start of Apocalypse's reign), and in the future, at the height of his rule. The mission is to "get the X-Men back to the '90s," and Bishop and Forge are on the case. It looks like an adaptation of sorts of the famous Age of Apocalypse comic storyline. which sees Apocalypse cause all sorts of problems for the X-Men. In the trailer, Apocalypse declares: "I must strike them at their most vulnerable, the 1990s!"
paragraphs.cn: 我们既能看到古埃及时代的恩·沙巴·努尔（天启统治之始），也能看到未来其权势如日中天的模样。任务的核心是「把X战警送回90年代」，主教和锻造者负责执行。这看起来是对经典漫画篇章《天启时代》的某种改编——在那段故事中，天启给X战警带来了无穷无尽的麻烦。预告片中，天启宣告道：「我必须在他们最脆弱的时候打击他们，那就是1990年代！」

paragraphs.en: The trailer kicks off with Rogue still grieving the death of Gambit, who heroically saved the day in Season 1. One of the big surprises in the trailer is a brief look at Deadpool, but it's not actually the 'Merc with the Mouth,' rather Morph taking his form. Still, it will be interesting to see Deadpool in battle, and any fourth wall-breaking quips he might have up his sleeve.
paragraphs.cn: 预告片以小淘气仍在为甘比特之死哀悼开场——后者在第一季中英雄般地拯救了大局。预告中的一大惊喜是死侍的短暂亮相，不过这其实并非「贱嘴佣兵」本尊，而是变形怪化身成了他的模样。即便如此，看到死侍上阵作战、再来几句打破第四面墙的招牌吐槽，依然会非常有趣。

paragraphs.en: X-Men '97 Season 2 continues with the heroic mutant team of X-Men, divided and thrown across different eras in time as they struggle to navigate their return home. Meanwhile, back in the 1990s, suspicious foes and new strains of mutant intolerance are on the rise in the wake of the X-Men's absence. The second season of the original animated series features nine episodes, and the voice cast includes Ross Marquand as Professor X, Matthew Waterson as Magneto, Ray Chase as Cyclops, Jennifer Hale as Jean Grey, Alison Sealy-Smith as Storm, Cal Dodd as Wolverine, Lenore Zann as Rogue, and George Buza as Beast.
paragraphs.cn: 「《X战警97》第二季延续了X战警这支英勇变种人团队的故事——他们被打散、抛入不同的历史年代，奋力寻找回家的路。与此同时，在1990年代，可疑的敌人与新一波针对变种人的歧视浪潮正趁X战警缺席而抬头。这部原创动画剧集的第二季共有九集，配音阵容包括Ross Marquand（饰X教授）、Matthew Waterson（饰万磁王）、Ray Chase（饰镭射眼）、Jennifer Hale（饰琴·葛雷）、Alison Sealy-Smith（饰暴风女）、Cal Dodd（饰金刚狼）、Lenore Zann（饰小淘气）和George Buza（饰野兽）。」

paragraphs.en: The series is executive produced by Brad Winderbaum, Kevin Feige, Louis D'Esposito, Dana Vasquez-Eberhardt, Julia Lewald, Eric Lewald, Larry Houston, and Beau DeMayo. The supervising producer is Jake Castorena. Episodes written by JB Ballard, Beau DeMayo, Bailey Moore, Antony Sellitti, Brian Ford Sullivan, and Mariah Wilson. The episodic directors are Emmett Yonemura and Chase Conley.
paragraphs.cn: 剧集由Brad Winderbaum、Kevin Feige、Louis D'Esposito、Dana Vasquez-Eberhardt、Julia Lewald、Eric Lewald、Larry Houston和Beau DeMayo共同担任执行制片人，监制为Jake Castorena。各集编剧包括JB Ballard、Beau DeMayo、Bailey Moore、Antony Sellitti、Brian Ford Sullivan和Mariah Wilson，分集导演为Emmett Yonemura和Chase Conley。

paragraphs.en: Wolverine looks back to his best in X-Men '97 Season 2.
paragraphs.cn: 金刚狼在《X战警97》第二季中重回巅峰状态。

paragraphs.en: IGN's X-Men '97: Season 1 review returned a 9/10. We said: "X-Men '97 isn't just a fitting continuation of X-Men: The Animated Series, but one of the best adaptations ever of this iconic Marvel franchise."
paragraphs.cn: IGN此前给《X战警97》第一季打出了9分（满分10分）的高分评价。我们写道：「《X战警97》不仅是《X战警动画版》一次恰到好处的续作，更是这个标志性漫威IP有史以来最优秀的改编作品之一。」

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
